title: VLANs, Trunks, STP, Aggregation, and MTU
description: Segment a campus switch fabric for staff, voice, guest, management, and redundant uplinks. Learners cumulatively produce a complete first version of a verified switched campus configuration plan while every earlier competency remains active through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Configure VLAN membership and tagged links without native-VLAN ambiguity.
Prevent loops and predict spanning-tree port behavior.
Aggregate links and manage speed, duplex, MTU, and SVI dependencies.
